[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000010 2
1 11101111 7
2 01101100 4
3 00001101 3
4 11000100 3
5 10101001 4
6 11011011 6
7 10000010 2

01 10 01100000 2
12 21 00001100 2
23 32 00000100 1
34 43 10000000 1
45 54 10001001 3
56 65 10000010 2 match 0 7
67 76 10000000 1
70 07 00010000 1

02 20 00000001 1

24 42 00001001 2
35 53 11000000 2
46 64 10000000 1
57 75 10011000 3
60 06 00000010 1
71 17 00001100 2

36 63 10000000 1

50 05 01010011 4
61 16 00000000 a
72 27 00001100 2

15 51 01001000 2
26 62 00000000 a
37 73 10000100 2
